p:cNvPr.name: Graphic 23
p:cNvPr.descr: Bar graph with upward trend with solid fill

p:cNvPr.name: Graphic 33
p:cNvPr.descr: Lightbulb and gear with solid fill

a:r.a:t: ANALISIS DAN PERANCANGAN SISTEM INFORMASI PRAKTIKUM BERBASIS PROGRESSIVE WEB APPLICATION (PWA) MENGGUNAKAN METODE R&D DI AKADEMI KEBIDANAN MEGA BUANA
